name: Harry Web
subject: orgopolis.com – Website UI, UX and SEO Issues Found
message:
Hello,

I took a quick look at your website orgopolis.com and noticed several UI and UX issues that may be affecting how visitors interact with your site and convert into leads or customers.

Some of the key issues include buttons that are not clearly visible or easy to click, small or hard-to-read fonts, and a layout and color scheme that can feel confusing to users. On mobile devices, the site does not always display properly, and some forms and menus are not easy to find or use.

From a user experience point of view, pages take longer than expected to load, visitors have trouble finding what they are looking for, and navigation is not very intuitive. In some cases, it takes too many steps to contact you or complete a purchase, and the main call-to-action buttons like “Contact Us” or “Buy Now” are not clear enough.

These issues can lead to higher bounce rates, fewer inquiries, and lower performance on Google.

If you’d like, I can prepare a free report that shows these problems in detail and explains how they can be fixed to improve results.

Kind regards,
